nasb.text: When he had landed at Caesarea, he went up and greeted the church, and went down to Antioch.

esv.text: When he had landed at Caesarea, he went up and greeted the church, and then went down to Antioch.

cnv.text: 保羅在該撒利亞登岸，上耶路撒冷問候教會，然後下安提阿去。

ccb.text: 他在凯撒利亚登岸后，先上耶路撒冷去问候教会，再下到安提阿。

csbs.text: 保罗在凯撒里亚登陆，上耶路撒冷去问候教会，然后下安提阿去。
